_metadata.source: US Department of State Bureau of Consular Affairs
_metadata.purpose: US State Dept travel advisory levels for security-bodyguard city risk profiles
_metadata.data_limitation: travel.state.gov blocked automated access (JavaScript/cookie barrier). Data compiled from OSAC reports, known advisory levels, and cross-referenced with FCDO data.
notes: State Dept advisory levels are whole-country but include sub-regional warnings
OSAC (Overseas Security Advisory Council) provides supplementary crime/security data
Middle East advisories elevated across board due to Iran-Israel regional conflict
Some Level 3/4 designations reflect April 2026 regional escalation

sub_warnings: Do Not Travel: Borno, Yobe, Adamawa, northern Katsina, northern Zamfara states
nigeria.notes: One of highest kidnapping rates globally. NE Nigeria ISWA/Boko Haram active conflict zone.

sub_warnings: Do Not Travel: Kenya-Somalia border areas, Eastleigh (parts)
kenya.notes: Al-Shabaab primary threat. Nairobi Eastleigh area high risk. Previous Westgate/DusitD2 attacks.

sub_warnings: Reconsider Travel: townships, CBD areas after dark
south_africa.notes: One of highest murder rates globally. Carjacking epidemic. Airport crime targeting. Kidnapping increasing.

sub_warnings: Do Not Travel: Arauca, Cauca, Norte de Santander departments
colombia.notes: FARC dissidents and ELN active. Border regions most dangerous. Bogota crime concentrated in certain areas.

mexico.advisory_text: Exercise Increased Caution (country). Do Not Travel to specific states.
sub_warnings: Do Not Travel: Colima, Guerrero, Michoacan, Sinaloa, Tamaulipas, Zacatecas
Reconsider Travel: Baja California, Chihuahua, Durango, Guanajuato, Jalisco, Morelos, Sonora
mexico.notes: Cartel violence in restricted states. Mexico City relatively safer but express kidnapping risk.

sub_warnings: Do Not Travel: within 10km of Syria border
Reconsider Travel: Hakkari, Sirnak provinces
turkey.notes: PKK and ISIS threat. Arbitrary detention risk for dual nationals. Previous airport/tourist attacks.

saudi_arabia.advisory_text: Reconsider Travel (elevated due to regional escalation)
sub_warnings: Do Not Travel: within 50 miles of Yemen border
Missile/drone attack risk nationwide
saudi_arabia.notes: Elevated from Level 2 due to Iran-Israel regional escalation. Houthi missile/drone attacks. Eastern Province exposed.

uae.advisory_text: Reconsider Travel (elevated due to regional escalation)
sub_warnings: Missile/drone attack risk from Iran/proxies
uae.notes: Elevated from Level 2 due to Iran-Israel regional escalation. Previously among safest countries globally. Critical infrastructure targeting risk.

sub_warnings: Do Not Travel: Jammu & Kashmir, India-Pakistan border
Reconsider Travel: Manipur
india.notes: India-Pakistan tensions elevated. J&K and Manipur conflict zones. Major cities generally safe for business.

sub_warnings: Entire country Level 4
russia.notes: Level 4 since Ukraine invasion. Arbitrary detention of Western nationals. No direct US flights. Embassy services extremely limited.

sub_warnings: Reconsider Travel: any favela/informal housing area
brazil.notes: Extremely high murder rate. Favela areas no-go. Carjacking, armed robbery common in major cities.

sub_warnings: Do Not Travel: Sulu Archipelago, Marawi City
Reconsider Travel: Mindanao
philippines.notes: Abu Sayyaf and ISIS-aligned groups in Mindanao. Manila generally safe with precautions.

sub_warnings: Do Not Travel: Balochistan, KPK tribal areas, Afghanistan border
Reconsider Travel: KPK settled areas
pakistan.notes: TTP and ISIL-K active. Multiple bombings/attacks per month. Karachi targeted killings. India tensions elevated.

sub_warnings: Do Not Travel: Yala, Pattani, Narathiwat, southern Songkhla
thailand.notes: Southern insurgency contained. Bangkok and tourist areas generally safe. Road accident risk very high.

sub_warnings: Reconsider Travel: Central Sulawesi (Poso area)
Do Not Travel: Papua conflict areas
indonesia.notes: JI and ISIS-aligned threats. Previous Jakarta and Bali attacks. Earthquake/tsunami/volcano risk.

uk.notes: Terrorism threat SUBSTANTIAL. Knife crime in London. Major EP market.

usa.notes: Gun violence risk unique among developed nations. NYC relatively safe but active shooter risk everywhere.

france.notes: Elevated terrorism threat. Multiple previous major attacks. Yellow vest style protests possible.

germany.notes: Christmas market attack precedent. Generally safe.

japan.notes: Extremely safe. Earthquake/tsunami risk primary concern.

hong_kong.notes: NSL broad application. Detention risk for political speech. Low street crime.

singapore.notes: Extremely safe. Severe drug law penalties.

qatar.advisory_text: Reconsider Travel (elevated due to regional escalation)
qatar.notes: Elevated from Level 1 due to Iran-Israel regional escalation. Al Udeid Air Base presence. Missile/drone risk.

kuwait.advisory_text: Reconsider Travel (elevated due to regional escalation)
kuwait.notes: Elevated from Level 1 due to regional escalation. US military presence. Iraq border proximity.

ghana.notes: Relatively safe for West Africa. Bawku area conflict localized.

tanzania.notes: Cabo Delgado spillover risk from Mozambique. Street crime in Dar es Salaam.

sub_warnings: Do Not Travel: Tigray, Amhara, Gambela, border areas
ethiopia.notes: Multiple active conflict zones. Post-Tigray instability. Amhara militia operations.

sub_warnings: Reconsider Travel: VRAEM, Colombia border
peru.notes: State of emergency active. Protests and roadblocks. Express kidnapping in Lima.

argentina.notes: Generally safe. Economic instability drives periodic unrest.

chile.notes: Wildfires in south. Street crime increasing. Protests possible.

china.notes: Arbitrary detention and exit ban risk. Extensive surveillance. Low street crime.

israel.notes: Level 4 due to active conflict. Rocket/drone attacks daily. Iranian strikes. Limited flights.

sub_warnings: Do Not Travel: Sinai Peninsula (except Sharm El Sheikh by air)
Do Not Travel: Western Desert
egypt.notes: Sinai insurgency. Gaza conflict proximity. Cairo generally safe with awareness.

morocco.notes: Generally safe. Terrorism threat present but well-managed by authorities.
